productDisplayName: Puma Men MM III Navy Blue Slipper
description: The latest Miami III series of flip-flops from puma are here. Chill out by the pool or beach, wear it out and about or around the house & ndash the soft footbed and strong gripped outsole mean this is a flip flop ready to go with you anywhere. Dark blue and bright yellow make an eye-catching colour combination. Comes with a handy bright red fabric bag to carry your flip-flops in. Upper Dual-toned thong straps with rubber logo and padded inner Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort puma cat logo on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
